title: Create: Back Off!
description: Keep entities at bay and stop griefing
body:
##  This is a [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) Addon featuring a flashy new block:

## The **Resistor**
![A Resistor powered by a Creative Motor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8e169d01c6e2b200eb08a80733afe68a4dfb307.png)
### This configurable mechanical block can 
+ Block entities coming in
+ Stop players from changing blocks inside
+ Be ajusted on the fly (even automatically)
### Restraining Orders and Legal Paper
![Legal Paper and Restraining Order](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bc096c7c0c912c67ed94c241c2bf52b46516b1ea.png)
Can be used to filter and configure the Resistor
## Features
+ New items and a block
+ Create Mod automation and interactivity
+ Ponders
+ Multiplayer friendly
